response:
subject: Thank you for your helpful and detailed response  

body:  

Dear Mr. Ivan Klimkovic,  

Thank you for your helpful and detailed response.  

I would like to express my appreciation for the information provided.  

Regarding the current machine vision system, I believe there may be a misunderstanding concerning the model and the image sensor. The system in question is the FLIR FL3-U3-120S3C-C, and the image sensor used is the Sony IMX172, not the e2V sensor as previously stated.  

I have attached the technical data to this email for your reference.  

Please refer to the FL3-U3-Technical-Reference PDF file for detailed specifications, and specifically page 18 for the datasheet. For the quantum efficiency, please consult the FL3-U3-EMVA-Imaging PDF file on page 13.  

I will review these files and manuals more carefully and will inform you of my findings.  

Thank you again for your assistance.  

Best regards,  
[Your Name]
